attributes.action: Minimum fare regulation for PHVs to support sustainable driver pay
attributes.additional_details: Private hire fares are unregulated, allowing platforms to increase commission and suppress driver earnings. In London’s high cost-of-living environment, this undermines workforce sustainability and service quality. Parliament should amend transport legislation to grant TfL explicit statutory powers to set minimum per-mile and per-minute PHV fares, aligning regulation with the licensed black cab model.
attributes.background: Private hire drivers face falling real-terms pay due to unregulated fares and high platform commissions. Government should empower TfL to set minimum per-mile and per-minute fares, as with black cabs, to ensure fair pay, sustainability, and service standards.

rejection.details: This petition is local (London area only) and concerns TfL for whom the Government do not have direct responsibility.
